children.label: i
children.text: $97,000,000 for fiscal year 2010; and

children.label: ii
children.text: such sums as may be necessary for each of fiscal years 2011 through 2014.

children.heading: Part IV reservation
children.label: B Part IV reservation
children.text: Of the amount appropriated under subparagraph (A) for a fiscal year, the Corporation may reserve such sums as may be necessary to carry out part IV of division B of subchapter I.

children.heading: Section 12561a
children.label: C Section 12561a
children.text: Of the amount appropriated under subparagraph (A) and not reserved under subparagraph (B) for a fiscal year, not more than $7,000,000 shall be made available for awards to Campuses of Service under .section 12561a of this title

children.heading: Section 12563(c)(8)
children.label: D Section 12563(c)(8)
children.text: Of the amount appropriated under subparagraph (A) and not reserved under subparagraph (B) for a fiscal year, not more than $10,000,000 shall be made available for summer of service program grants under , and not more than $10,000,000 shall be deposited in the National Service Trust to support summer of service educational awards, consistent with .section 12563(c)(8) of this titlesection 12563(c)(8) of this title

children.heading: Section 12563(c)(9)
children.label: E Section 12563(c)(9)
children.text: Of the amount appropriated under subparagraph (A) and not reserved under subparagraph (B) for a fiscal year, not more than $20,000,000 shall be made available for youth engagement zone programs under .section 12563(c)(9) of this title

children.label: i
children.text: not more than 60 percent shall be available to provide financial assistance under part I of division B of subchapter I;

children.label: ii
children.text: not more than 25 percent shall be available to provide financial assistance under part II of such division; and

children.label: iii
children.text: not less than 15 percent shall be available to provide financial assistance under part III of such division.

children.heading: Divisions C and D
children.label: 2 Divisions C and D
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated, for each of fiscal years 2010 through 2014, such sums as may be necessary to provide financial assistance under division C of subchapter I and to provide national service educational awards under division D of subchapter I for the number of participants described in for each such fiscal year.section 12571(f)(1) of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to operate the National Civilian Community Corps and provide financial assistance under division E of subchapter I, such sums as may be necessary for each of fiscal years 2010 through 2014.

children.heading: Priority
children.label: B Priority
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of this chapter, in obligating the amounts made available pursuant to the authorization of appropriations in this paragraph, priority shall be given to programs carrying out activities in areas for which the President has declared the existence of a major disaster, in accordance with , including a major disaster as a consequence of Hurricane Katrina or Rita.section 5170 of this title

children.heading: Authorization
children.label: A Authorization
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary for each of fiscal years 2010 through 2014 to provide financial assistance under division H of subchapter I.

children.heading: Section 12653b
children.label: B Section 12653b
children.text: Of the amount authorized under subparagraph (A) for a fiscal year, such sums as may be necessary shall be made available to provide financial assistance under and to provide national service educational awards under division D of subchapter I to the number of participants in national service positions established or increased as provided in for such year.section 12653b of this titlesection 12653b(b)(3) of this title

children.heading: Section 12653c
children.label: C Section 12653c
children.text: Of the amount authorized under subparagraph (A) for a fiscal year, $12,000,000 shall be made available to provide financial assistance under .section 12653c of this title

children.heading: Section 12653h
children.label: D Section 12653h
children.text: Of the amount authorized under subparagraph (A) for a fiscal year, such sums as may be necessary shall be made available to provide financial assistance under .section 12653h of this title

children.label: i
children.text: $50,000,000 for fiscal year 2010;

children.label: ii
children.text: $60,000,000 for fiscal year 2011;

children.label: iii
children.text: $70,000,000 for fiscal year 2012;

children.label: iv
children.text: $80,000,000 for fiscal year 2013; and

children.label: v
children.text: $100,000,000 for fiscal year 2014.

children.label: i
children.text: $50,000,000 for fiscal year 2010;

children.label: ii
children.text: $60,000,000 for fiscal year 2011;

children.label: iii
children.text: $70,000,000 for fiscal year 2012;

children.label: iv
children.text: $80,000,000 for fiscal year 2013; and

children.label: v
children.text: $100,000,000 for fiscal year 2014.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated for the administration of this chapter, including financial assistance under , such sums as may be necessary for each of fiscal years 2010 through 2014.section 12576(a) of this title

children.heading: Corporation
children.label: B Corporation
children.text: Of the amounts appropriated under subparagraph (A) for a fiscal year, a portion shall be made available to provide financial assistance under .section 12576(a) of this title

children.heading: Evaluation, training, and technical assistance
children.label: 6 Evaluation, training, and technical assistance
children.text: Notwithstanding paragraphs (1), (2), and (4) and any other provision of law, of the amounts appropriated for a fiscal year under divisions B, C, and H of subchapter I of this chapter and under titles I and II of the Domestic Volunteer Service Act of 1973 [ et seq., 5000 et seq.], the Corporation shall reserve not more than 2.5 percent to carry out sections 12523(e) and 12639a of this title and division K of subchapter I, of which $1,000,000 shall be used by the Corporation to carry out . Notwithstanding subsection (b), amounts so reserved shall be available only for the fiscal year for which the amounts are reserved.42 U.S.C. 49511section 12639a of this titleSee References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Availability of appropriations
children.label: b Availability of appropriations
children.text: Funds appropriated under this section shall remain available until expended.
